title: juncus subulatus f. salinus
intro: Juncus subulatus f. salinus, also known as salt rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus subulatus plant that is highly tolerant of salt and can thrive in coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Juncus subulatus f. salinus include its ability to act as a diuretic and help to reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fluid retention, and soothe skin irritations. Juncus subulatus f. salinus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and stems can also be used in tincture or salve form to harness its medicinal properties.
